artifacts.name: Baker
artifacts.description: An exquisite metal alloy classical figural statue depicting a traditional French baker, selected by Henry Plant to add European artistic flair to the hotel's prominent reception areas.

artifacts.name: Blue & White Garden Seat
artifacts.description: A barrel-shaped porcelain garden seat hand-decorated with deep blue cobalt landscape panels. These seats lined the grand verandas for guests relaxing outdoors.

artifacts.name: Blue & White Jardiniere
artifacts.description: A massive English ceramic planter decorated with rich multi-layered cobalt detailing, used to show off exotic flora inside the hotel's main hallways.

artifacts.name: Blue and White Bowl (Instance 1)
artifacts.description: An original decorative Meiji-era porcelain bowl featuring detailed landscape and linear artwork, hand-selected on buying trips through East Asia.

artifacts.name: Blue and White Bowl (Instance 2)
artifacts.description: An additional matching multi-paneled Japanese ceramic bowl display, used to hold ornate table centerpieces for high-society dining events.

artifacts.name: Blue Garden Seat
artifacts.description: An English ceramic seat featuring a deep, vibrant solid blue wash, designed to offer seating for hotel guests along the brick sun verandas.

artifacts.name: Bonito Lake
artifacts.description: A long, panoramic natural view rendered in fine gouache paint, showing the peaceful mountain lakes frequented by vacationers during the Gilded Age.

artifacts.name: Bottleneck Vase
artifacts.description: A classic porcelain vase featuring a distinct narrow bottleneck form and high-gloss translucent glaze coat, showing off fine Asian craft design.

artifacts.name: Boulle Style Cabinet (Marble Top)
artifacts.specs: Height: 44 in. Wood with marble top
artifacts.description: A beautiful low cabinet styled after André-Charles Boulle, featuring ebonized wood finishes, bright brass inlay trims, and a heavy white marble counter slab.

artifacts.name: Boulle Style Cabinet (Mahogany)
artifacts.description: A tall, majestic mahogany cabinet featuring ornate brass accents and premium glass display windows, used to exhibit curio artifacts in parlor suites.

artifacts.name: Boulle Style Table
artifacts.specs: Height: 31 in. Wood with brass inlay
artifacts.description: An opulent parlor center table displaying complex tortoiseshell and brass scrollwork marquetry, serving as a social focal point in luxury rooms.

artifacts.name: Boy with Harp
artifacts.description: A romanticist metal alloy statue detailing a young classical performer strumming a harp, celebrating music and fine theater aesthetics.

artifacts.name: Briar Root Bench
artifacts.description: An incredible rustic statement bench made from woven, natural briar root branches, placed inside the hotel's solariums to create an indoor-outdoor oasis look.

artifacts.name: Bronze Vases
artifacts.description: A matching pair of cast bronze vases featuring relief work of seasonal cherry blossoms, showing the high-quality international arts imported by Henry Plant.

artifacts.name: Carved Shodana
artifacts.specs: Height: 91 in. Teckwood with gilded panels
artifacts.description: A monumental 7-foot tall teak wood display cabinet featuring asymmetric shelves, gold leaf landscape backgrounds, and fine ivory accents.

artifacts.name: Celadon Floor Vase
artifacts.description: A large ceramic floor jar finished in a classic pale sea-green jade-like celadon crackle glaze coat, popular among high-society collectors.

artifacts.name: Celadon Garden Seat
artifacts.description: A glazed light-green ceramic garden seat displaying openwork double-coin patterns and raised slip-dot textures running along its edges.

artifacts.name: Cellini
artifacts.specs: Height: 23 in. White metal with bronze patina
artifacts.description: A tribute sculpture honoring the master Renaissance craftsman Benvenuto Cellini, rendered in white metal with a deep chemically developed bronze patina finish.

artifacts.name: Ceramic Flask (German)
artifacts.description: An authentic salt-glazed ceramic flask showing historical coat-of-arms relief designs, imported from Germany as a novelty decoration item.

artifacts.name: Ceramic Flask (Hungarian)
artifacts.description: A colorful glazed majolica ceramic flask featuring traditional Hungarian floral borders and unique stylized loop handles.

artifacts.name: Chinese Chair
artifacts.specs: Height: 36 in. Hardwood and inset marble
artifacts.description: A heavy, hand-carved rosewood armchair featuring an inset circular plaque of natural dreamstone marble mimicking storm clouds.

artifacts.name: Cleopatra
artifacts.specs: Height: 36 in. Hardwood and inset marble
artifacts.description: A dramatic romanticist cast metal sculpture depicting Cleopatra VII reclining on an Egyptian couch, showcasing detailed drapery work.

artifacts.name: Cloisonne Vase (Peony)
artifacts.description: A stunning enamel-on-copper vase that uses thin wire frames to hold layers of rich green, red, and gold glass paste forming blooming peonies.

artifacts.name: Cloisonne Vase (Dragon)
artifacts.description: An intricate wire cloisonné vase depicting a long imperial dragon coiling across a polished midnight-blue glass sky background.

artifacts.name: Cobalt Blue Vase
artifacts.description: A rare early 1800s porcelain display vase coated in a deep Sevres cobalt blue glaze and detailed with delicate hand-painted gold accents.

artifacts.name: Cobalt Garden Seat
artifacts.description: A rich cobalt blue glazed porcelain garden stool featuring open decorative cutouts and stylized elephant-head relief work on the sides.

artifacts.name: Cobalt Imari Vase
artifacts.description: A massive 3-foot tall porcelain statement urn blending deep cobalt underglazes with brilliant iron-red and gold floral patterns.

artifacts.name: Cobalt Mirror
artifacts.description: A breathtaking Venetian-style decorative wall mirror framed with custom blown glass elements and deep cobalt blue floral appliques.

artifacts.name: Collector's Cabinet
artifacts.specs: Height: 26 in. Wood with ivory inlay
artifacts.description: A desktop locking display chest built from fine hardwood and featuring miniature hand-etched ivory panels showing historical scenes.

artifacts.name: Conversation
artifacts.description: A large Swiss oil painting depicting Victorian figures gathered together in conversation, hung in public social parlors.

artifacts.name: Correggio
artifacts.description: A French cast metal alloy figural statue celebrating the classic Italian painter Antonio da Correggio, embodying fine art appreciation.

artifacts.name: Departure
artifacts.description: A moody Norwegian oil canvas painting depicting ships leaving a dock, a visual nod to Henry Plant's own steamship lines.

artifacts.name: Dog Portrait
artifacts.description: A charming, small-scale portrait painting focusing on a dark hunting hound, displayed in the hotel's masculine card and billiard rooms.

artifacts.name: Dog Wearing Coat
artifacts.description: A whimsical, humorous Gilded Age painting showing a small terrier dog dressed up in a custom winter coat panel.

artifacts.name: Duke of Savoy
artifacts.description: A historical portrait painting of European nobility rendered in oil on wood panel, bringing an old-world look into the Florida resort.

artifacts.name: Effroi
artifacts.description: A detailed French figurative metal alloy statue capturing high-stakes emotional drama, typical of late Victorian interior design choices.

artifacts.name: Elephant Garden Seat
artifacts.description: An glazed ceramic stool sculpted into a classic caparisoned elephant carrying a seat platform, tapping into popular Orientalism trends.

artifacts.name: Elephant with Pagoda
artifacts.description: An intricate glazed ceramic structural stand modeled as a royal elephant balancing an ornate multi-tiered pagoda tower on its back.

artifacts.name: Esmeralda
artifacts.description: A majestic, full-scale cast iron indoor statue depicting the famous character Esmeralda from Victor Hugo's fiction, treated with a bronze finish.

artifacts.name: Ewer with Cherub
artifacts.description: A large decorative display pitcher featuring an elaborate sculptural handle wrapped with miniature cherubs and trailing grapevines.

artifacts.name: Flower Vase with Swan
artifacts.description: A massive 4.5-foot tall ceramic vase featuring sculpted white swan figures forming the side handles, used as a parlor center feature.

artifacts.name: French Chair
artifacts.description: A light salon chair crafted from hand-carved wood and finished entirely in gold leaf gilding, used in the ladies' drawing rooms.

artifacts.name: Frog Garden Seat
artifacts.description: A rare earthenware stool from Bohemia sculpted into a large, stylized frog sitting on a riverbed, covered in bright green earthy majolica glazes.

artifacts.name: Fruit Still Life
artifacts.description: A large American oil painting detailing a rich spread of autumn harvest fruit, hung inside the hotel's grand main dining room.

artifacts.name: Garden Seat with Figure
artifacts.description: A Chinese ceramic porch seat painted with scenes of traditional figures walking through courtyard pavilions and terraced gardens.

artifacts.name: Gilded Bronze Clock
artifacts.description: A gold-gilded bronze mantel clock displaying elaborate floral scrollwork carvings and an polished white enamel dial face.

artifacts.name: Hay Wagon
artifacts.description: A German pastoral oil landscape showing a traditional horse-drawn hay wagon moving through rolling farmlands during sunset.

artifacts.name: Haystacks
artifacts.description: An impressionist landscape painting depicting open wheat fields and stacked hay mounds, catching shifting afternoon light effects.

artifacts.name: Henry B. Plant
artifacts.description: The official formal oil portrait of founder Henry Bradley Plant, capturing the transportation tycoon at the peak of his railroad business career.

artifacts.name: Herman Glogowski
artifacts.description: An original oil portrait of Herman Glogowski, Tampa's historic first Jewish mayor and a close civic partner to Henry Plant's development projects.

artifacts.name: Hotel and Bridge
artifacts.description: A rare archival photograph capturing the iron bridge spanning the Hillsborough River with the newly built hotel rising in the background background.

artifacts.name: Hotel Construction
artifacts.description: An original historical progress shot from March 1889 showing scaffolding surrounding the brickwork layers and minaret bases during construction.

artifacts.name: Hotel East Front
artifacts.description: A souvenir print from 1893 showcasing the eastern facade of the resort, highlighting the landscaped tropical parks facing the riverfront.

artifacts.name: Hotel Guests
artifacts.description: An archival image documenting wealthy northern winter tourists entering the front gates via luxury horse carriages and rickshaws.

artifacts.name: Hotel Veranda
artifacts.description: A period print capturing guests relaxing in high-backed wicker rocking chairs along the signature quarter-mile-long brick veranda space.

artifacts.name: Hotel West Front
artifacts.description: A colorized vintage postcard showing the western main train platform entrance, where private luxury railcars dropped off guests directly.

artifacts.name: Hotel with Train
artifacts.description: An 1893 promotional print showing a Plant System steam engine pulled up right alongside the hotel's grand minaret-capped entrance towers.

artifacts.name: Hotel Workers
artifacts.description: A crucial large photograph tracking the diverse construction workers, carpenters, masonry crews, and gardeners who built the resort structure.

artifacts.name: Hunting Dogs
artifacts.description: A heavy cast iron sculpture of two hunting hounds tracking game, placed on the open lawns near the resort gun club facilities.

artifacts.name: Imari Fish Bowl
artifacts.description: A massive open ceramic basin detailed with gold leaf scales and swimming koi fish patterns, used to decorate the indoor garden solariums.

artifacts.name: Imari Floor Vase
artifacts.description: A historic 5-foot tall Japanese Imari porcelain floor urn, featuring dark iron-red floral grids and cobalt blue underglazes.

artifacts.name: Imari Vase
artifacts.description: A classic Imari porcelain tabletop vase featuring asymmetric panels that show panels of traditional landscape scenes and cranes.

artifacts.name: Japanese Vases
artifacts.description: A matching pair of porcelain display vases showcasing fine Meiji gold line details, purchased during the Plants' trips to the Orient.

artifacts.name: Jardinière and stand
artifacts.description: An English glazed earthenware planter balanced on a matching column stand, decorated with rich Victorian relief textures.

artifacts.name: Jardinière with Designs
artifacts.description: A tall ceramic display planter detailed with geometric art-nouveau style line designs, showing off late-period resort trends.

artifacts.name: Jardinière with Irises
artifacts.description: A glazed earthenware planter detailed with hand-painted purple and gold garden irises, mimicking the resort's external botanical parks.

artifacts.name: Jeweled Urn
artifacts.description: A decorative German porcelain urn detailed with raised ceramic slip dots that mimic glittering gemstone chains across its handles.

artifacts.name: Kutani Vase
artifacts.description: An authentic Kutani porcelain vase showing iron-red color patterns and detailed gold outlines illustrating traditional Japanese folklore stories.

artifacts.name: Lake George
artifacts.description: A peaceful landscape scene painted in gouache on heavy board, highlighting early American resort travel hotspots.

artifacts.name: Landscape with Goats
artifacts.description: A rustic German oil canvas showing a small herd of mountain goats resting along alpine cliffs, common in Gilded Age hotel collections.

artifacts.name: Landscape with Lake
artifacts.description: A soft, impressionistic gouache painting mapping the quiet mist hanging over a forest lake during early morning hours.

artifacts.name: Louis XV Style Chair
artifacts.description: An open armchair carved with fine Rococo scroll details and covered in gold leaf gilding, upholstered in rich silk damask fabrics.

artifacts.name: Louis XV Style Settee
artifacts.specs: Height: 39 in. Wood with brass trim
artifacts.description: A wide, elegant parlor settee bench built from dark wood, detailed with bright brass trim molding and patterned floral cushions.

artifacts.name: Magician
artifacts.description: A conversational metal alloy statue depicting a traveling theater magician performing sleight-of-hand card tricks.

artifacts.name: Marguerite de Valois
artifacts.description: A large French oil portrait painting detailing the royal dress and jewels of historical figure Marguerite de Valois.

artifacts.name: Mary Queen of Scots
artifacts.specs: Height: 18 in. Bronze with silver overlay
artifacts.description: A historic bronze portrait bust of Mary Stuart, featuring a detailed silver leaf overlay across her lace collar work.

artifacts.name: Micro-mosaic Seat
artifacts.description: An English ceramic garden stool covered entirely in tiny geometric transfer print patterns that mimic classical Roman micro-mosaic stone work.

artifacts.name: Monkey Garden Seat
artifacts.description: A playful German majolica ceramic porch stool sculpted as three monkeys holding up the seat cushion panel, showing Victorian humor trends.

artifacts.name: Mushroom Garden Seat
artifacts.description: A whimsical Bohemian glazed earthenware stool sculpted to mimic a collection of wild forest mushrooms growing out of moss foundations.

artifacts.name: Napoleon & Josephine
artifacts.description: A pair of unglazed matte bisque porcelain portrait figurines capturing Emperor Napoleon Bonaparte and Empress Josephine in full court regalia dress.

artifacts.name: Ornate Clock
artifacts.specs: Height: 44 in. Bronze with Gilded Patina
artifacts.description: A massive French parlor mantel clock crafted from heavy cast bronze and covered in gold leaf, serving as a time center for public lobbies.

artifacts.name: Peasant Girl
artifacts.description: A detailed figurative statue finished in multi-colored polychrome paints, capturing a rustic European country girl carrying a harvest water jug.

artifacts.name: Plant System Hotels Pass
artifacts.description: An authentic seasonal paper pass granting VIP access to Henry Plant's complete network of eight luxury Florida resort hotels.

artifacts.name: Plant System Pass
artifacts.description: An original printed quarterly rail pass issued to industrial executives, granting access across the complete Plant System rail network lines.

artifacts.name: Plant System Railroad Pass
artifacts.description: An historical paper railroad pass from 1901, displaying detailed engraving design work used to prevent travel fraud.

artifacts.name: Plant System Railways Pass
artifacts.description: A collectible leatherbound paper travel pass issued right before Henry Plant's death in 1899, tracking executive railroad travel authorization.

artifacts.name: Plant System SFW Train
artifacts.description: A miniature archival print from 1893 showing a South Florida Railroad locomotive engine operating along the regional tracks.

artifacts.name: Polychrome Relief
artifacts.description: A multi-colored metal alloy wall plaque relief casting showing a collection of classical figures celebrating seasonal grape harvests.

artifacts.name: Postcard
artifacts.description: An original 1908 printed postcard featuring a panoramic look of the hotel's silver minarets, sent by a guest to family up north.

artifacts.name: Postcard (Alligator)
artifacts.description: A humorous vintage postcard showing guests looking at native Florida alligators on the resort grounds, highlighting early local tourism tropes.

artifacts.name: Queen Elizabeth I
artifacts.specs: Height: 18 in. Bronze with Silver Overlay
artifacts.description: A fine bronze portrait sculpture of Queen Elizabeth I, featuring detailed silver electroplate overlay highlighting her elaborate Elizabethan collar panels.

artifacts.name: Queen Victoria
artifacts.description: A white matte Parian ware porcelain portrait bust capturing a young Queen Victoria, celebrating old-world British heritage design.

artifacts.name: Red Riding Hood
artifacts.description: A large 4.5-foot tall cast iron garden statue illustrating Little Red Riding Hood, used to decorate the entry fountain walkways.

artifacts.name: Regence Style Chair
artifacts.description: A high-backed formal armchair carved with heavy acanthus leaf scroll patterns and finished entirely in gold leaf coatings.

artifacts.name: Reticulated Vase
artifacts.description: An English ceramic display vase showcasing complex openwork reticulated latticed cuts along its outer double walls.

artifacts.name: Rooftop View, Minarets
artifacts.description: An historical photograph looking out across the rooflines, showing the massive size of the Moorish minarets and crescent moons up close.

artifacts.name: Salt Glaze Garden Seat (20 in.)
artifacts.description: A salt-glazed German stoneware seat finished in a signature blue and grey speckled sheen, built to weather outdoor veranda use.

artifacts.name: Salt Glaze Garden Seat (22 in.)
artifacts.description: A taller variant of the German salt-glazed stoneware porch stool, detailed with heavy molded lions head handles on the sides.

artifacts.name: Satsuma Garden Seat
artifacts.description: An authentic Japanese Satsuma ceramic seat covered in a soft ivory crackle glaze and detailed with complex gold line court portraits.

artifacts.name: Seated Shepherd Boy
artifacts.description: A small metal alloy sculpture showing a young country shepherd boy resting along a stone wall, typical of romantic table decorations.

artifacts.name: Sevres Style Vase
artifacts.description: A high-quality French style display urn featuring an painted center scene of court lovers, framed with heavy gold leaf trim borders.

artifacts.name: Shepherd Boy
artifacts.description: A companion alloy statue tracking a standing shepherd boy playing a traditional reed pipe instrument, celebrating country themes.

artifacts.name: Ships at Sea
artifacts.description: A crisp maritime oil painting tracking high masted clipper ships moving through rolling ocean whitecaps, highlighting ocean travel.

artifacts.name: Small Pouf
artifacts.description: A gilded low footstool upholstered in fine velvet fabric, matching the formal seating arrangements of the main drawing rooms.

artifacts.name: Spinning Girl
artifacts.description: A large 5-foot tall cast iron indoor statue detailing a young woman weaving textiles, a tribute to Gilded Age industry and craftsmanship.

artifacts.name: Sunrise
artifacts.description: A luminous maritime landscape oil canvas capturing early morning golden light reflecting over low coastal harbor canals.

artifacts.name: Tampa Bay Hotel (1897 Photo)
artifacts.description: An original silver-print photograph capturing the full length of the resort building at the absolute peak of its Gilded Age operation.

artifacts.name: Tampa Bay Hotel (1890 View)
artifacts.description: A rare historical photograph capturing the resort right before its official 1891 grand opening events commenced.

artifacts.name: Tampa Bay Hotel Ad
artifacts.description: An original printed news advertisement from 1905 layout maps, promoting the resort's complete fireproof construction and luxury rooms.

artifacts.name: Tampa Bay Hotel, Bridge
artifacts.description: An historical layout photograph tracking visitors crossing the old wooden footbridge to access the exotic botanical center gardens.

artifacts.name: Tampa Bay Hotel Brochure
artifacts.description: An original guest brochure from the 1898 season, detailing room rates, hunting club trips, and orchestra schedules.

artifacts.name: Tampa Bay Hotel Gates
artifacts.description: A clear souvenir paper print tracking the decorative wrought iron entry gates designed to keep out local cattle and secure the resort.

artifacts.name: Tampa Bay Hotel Photograph
artifacts.description: A crisp early glass-plate photograph print capturing the unique Moorish Revival architecture from across the lawns.

artifacts.name: Taming of Wild Horse
artifacts.description: A dynamic cast iron courtyard sculpture capturing a trainer wrestling a wild stallion, modeled after the famous Marly Horses of France.

artifacts.name: Terra Cotta Jug
artifacts.description: A rustic unglazed earthenware terra-cotta pitcher featuring simple folk art floral carvings, used to contrast with the formal porcelains.

artifacts.name: Twilight
artifacts.description: A rich tonalist American landscape painting capturing deep purple and amber sunset values hanging over marshy low country meadows.

artifacts.name: Vase Applied Flowers
artifacts.description: A high-relief German porcelain display vase featuring individually hand-sculpted, fragile flower petals applied directly onto the outer walls.

artifacts.name: Vase Cobalt Design
artifacts.description: An authentic Japanese porcelain jar painted with abstract deep blue cobalt fluid motion wave patterns along its rim zones.

artifacts.name: Vase with Birds
artifacts.description: An elegant Bohemian blown glass vase with enameled detailing showing native forest songbirds resting along winter tree branches.

artifacts.name: Vase with Child
artifacts.description: A decorative porcelain mantel vase featuring a sculpted porcelain cherub figure sitting and playing near the base molding paths.

artifacts.name: Vase with Flowers
artifacts.description: A classic Victorian English mantle urn featuring hand-painted panels of country roses and wild meadow floral clusters.

artifacts.name: Vase with Frog Men
artifacts.description: An incredibly rare Japanese ceramic vase featuring sculpted relief figures of mythological frog-men climbing along the neck casing.

artifacts.name: Vase with Geese
artifacts.description: A Chinese porcelain display jar showing detailed brushwork of a flock of wild marsh geese resting along reed-lined riverbanks.

artifacts.name: Venus
artifacts.description: A grand, heavy cast iron neoclassical garden statue depicting Venus, used to anchors the central focus of the resort's indoor solarium.

artifacts.name: Venus at the Bath
artifacts.description: A companion cast iron sculpture detailing Venus preparing for a bath, celebrating classical Roman architecture and myths.

artifacts.name: Victorian Lady
artifacts.description: A formal portrait painting in oil on canvas tracking the sophisticated winter travel dress of a wealthy Gilded Age woman.

artifacts.name: Victorian Lamp
artifacts.description: A massive 6-foot tall floor lamp crafted out of a monumental Chinese ceramic vase foundation and fitted with heavy French bronze base rings.

artifacts.name: Wedgwood Swan Vase
artifacts.description: An historic 4.5-foot tall English Wedgwood Jasperware vase featuring relief swan handles and white classical muses layered on fine light blue stoneware backgrounds.

artifacts.name: Wine, Women & Song
artifacts.description: A massive German oil festival painting celebrating music and community festivities, hung in the hotel's long grand ballroom wings.

artifacts.name: Winter Scene
artifacts.description: A crisp, beautiful oil painting on wood panel showing snow blanketed French country villages, offering a mental contrast to Florida's warm winters.

artifacts.name: Worcester Vase
artifacts.description: A stately Royal Worcester English ceramic display urn detailed with gold relief handle leaves and custom hand painted floral bouquets.

artifacts.name: Yellow Jardinière
artifacts.description: An English earthenware planter finished in a distinct bright yellow mustard glaze, designed to catch sunlight on parlor window casings.
